channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Monahan with goal and assist, Blue Jackets extend points streak to 6 with 6-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Sean Monahan had a goal and assist, and the Columbus Blue Jackets extended their points streak to six games with a 6-3 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jaxson Stauber shuts out Vegas in season debut, 6-0
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Jaxson Stauber made 29 saves for his first NHL shutout, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vegas Golden Knights 6-0 at T-Mobile Arena on Saturday. It was Stauber’s debut for Utah, his seventh NHL game and his first since Feb. 22, 2023, with the Chicago Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kyrie Irving scores 30 to lead Dallas past Jazz, 106-94
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Kyrie Irving went for 30 points, as the Dallas Mavericks beat the Utah Jazz for a second time this season, 106-94.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes women upset #3 Notre Dame, 78-67
item.description: GEORGE TOWN, CAYMAN ISLANDS — The Utah women's basketball team picked up their highest ranked win outside of the Huntsman Center in school history by taking down No. 3 Notre Dame, 78-67, in the final game of the Cayman Island Classic.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gus Malzahn is leaving UCF to become Florida State's offensive coordinator, AP source says
item.description: Gus Malzahn is resigning as Central Florida's head coach to become Florida State's offensive coordinator, a person familiar with the hire told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU knocks off NC State in third place game, 72-61
item.description: SAN DIEGO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU got back in the win column with a 72-61 win over NC State on Thursday afternoon at the Rady Children’s Invitational at LionTree Arena in San Diego, Calif.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Alabama A&M player Medrick Burnett Jr. dies following injury during game
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (WIAT) — Medrick Burnett Jr., a 20-year-old football player for Alabama A&M University, died Wednesday a month after sustaining a serious injury during a football game. Burnett Jr., a linebacker who was injured during the Magic City Classic on Oct.
item.dc:creator: Drew Taylor, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers to likely play Bills in heavy snow, 'dangerously cold wind chills': NWS
item.description: (KRON) -- In last week's 38-10 blowout loss to the Green Bay Packers, the 49ers' loss had little to do with the weather at Lambeau Field, also known as "The Frozen Tundra." At kickoff, it was a calm 42 degrees and mostly cloudy in the typical chilly Midwest city.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Orlando takes on Chicago, aims for 4th straight win
item.description: Chicago Bulls (8-11, ninth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Orlando Magic (12-7, third in the Eastern Conference) Orlando, Florida; Wednesday, 7 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: CU Buffs basketball upsets defending champion UConn at Maui Invitational
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — What a huge win for Tadd Boyle and the Colorado Buffaloes. A 14.5-point underdog against the two-time defending national champion #2 UConn Huskies at the Maui Invitational, CU erased an early 11-point deficit before going blow for blow in the second half.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
